description: HeartFlow, Inc., a medical technology company, provides non-invasive solutions for diagnosing and managing coronary artery diseases the United States and worldwide. Its HeartFlow Platform uses AI and computational fluid dynamics to creates a personalized 3D model of a patient's heart from a single coronary computed tomography angiography, a specialized type of scan that provides detailed images of the heart's arteries. The company provides Heartflow RoadMap Analysis that offers an intuitive anatomic visualization of the coronary arteries; Heartflow FFRCT Analysis, which calculates blood flow a
